task_completion.description: Create a custom Block Type named 'Promo Banner'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Drupal 'Block types' administration page (admin/structure/block/block-content/types) showing 'Promo Banner' in the list of custom block types, or a success message indicating the block type was created.

task_completion.description: Add a 'Promo Link' field to the block type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Manage fields' page for the Promo Banner block type showing a field labeled 'Promo Link' with the machine name 'field_promo_link' and field type 'Link'.

task_completion.description: Add a 'Coupon Code' field to the block type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Manage fields' page for the Promo Banner block type showing a field labeled 'Coupon Code' with the machine name 'field_coupon_code' and field type 'Text (plain)'.

task_completion.description: Create a block instance with the description 'Summer Audio Sale'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add custom block' or block edit form for the Promo Banner type, showing the 'Block description' field filled with exactly 'Summer Audio Sale'.

task_completion.description: Set the Coupon Code and Promo Link values for the block instance
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the block edit form showing 'SUMMER20' entered in the Coupon Code field, '/products' entered in the URL field of the Promo Link, and 'Shop Audio' entered in the Link text field.

task_completion.description: Place the block into the 'Sidebar' region of the default theme
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Block layout' administration page showing the 'Summer Audio Sale' block listed under the 'Sidebar' (or 'Sidebar first' / 'Sidebar second') region, or a configuration screen assigning it to that region.

integrity.description: Agent used the Drupal web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating Drupal administration pages (e.g., Structure > Block layout, Custom block library), rather than terminal commands like Drush or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Drupal application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should display the authentic Drupal Commerce admin UI, not a text editor, mocked HTML page, or notes app.

Look for green Drupal success messages (e.g., 'The block type Promo Banner has been added', 'Saved the Summer Audio Sale block', 'The block configuration has been saved') confirming the forms were submitted, rather than just filled out.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom block type must have the machine name 'promo_banner'. The fields must have the machine names 'field_promo_link' (Link type) and 'field_coupon_code' (Text plain type). The block instance must have the description 'Summer Audio Sale', coupon code 'SUMMER20', and link URL '/products' (which Drupal stores internally as 'internal:/products') with link text 'Shop Audio'. The block must be placed in the 'sidebar' region (which may appear as Sidebar, Sidebar First, or Sidebar Second depending on the theme's specific labels).
